title: Respond to rescue incidents
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Respond to rescue incidents demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for response

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain task and operational instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain task and operational instructions.

pcs.text: Confirm location and details of incident
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm location and details of incident?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm location and details of incident.

pcs.text: Collect tools and equipment according to task requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect tools and equipment according to task requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect tools and equipment according to task requirements.

pcs.text: Check tools and equipment for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check tools and equipment for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check tools and equipment for serviceability.

pcs.text: Identify faulty or unsafe tools and equipment, and separate for repair or replacement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify faulty or unsafe tools and equipment, and separate for repair or replacement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify faulty or unsafe tools and equipment, and separate for repair or replacement.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify local environment conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify local environment conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for response

elements.title: Respond to incident

pcs.text: Travel to incident location in a safe and efficient manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Travel to incident location in a safe and efficient manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Travel to incident location in a safe and efficient manner.

pcs.text: Maintain communication with base station and other rescue personnel at all times
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain communication with base station and other rescue personnel at all times?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain communication with base station and other rescue personnel at all times.

pcs.text: Carry out on-site search activities as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out on-site search activities as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out on-site search activities as necessary.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Respond to incident

elements.title: Effect rescue

pcs.text: Assess and monitor incident scene for hazards and appropriateness of planned procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and monitor incident scene for hazards and appropriateness of planned procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and monitor incident scene for hazards and appropriateness of planned procedures.

pcs.text: Modify planned procedures where necessary in response to local circumstances
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Modify planned procedures where necessary in response to local circumstances?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Modify planned procedures where necessary in response to local circumstances.

pcs.text: Provide support to other rescue services as appropriate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide support to other rescue services as appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide support to other rescue services as appropriate.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain access to casualties safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain access to casualties safely.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate equipment safely and appropriately?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate equipment safely and appropriately.

pcs.text: Communicate the progress of the rescue to appropriate rescue personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate the progress of the rescue to appropriate rescue personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate the progress of the rescue to appropriate rescue personnel.

pcs.text: Move casualties to safety as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move casualties to safety as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move casualties to safety as directed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Effect rescue

pcs.text: Recover, clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and PPE

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recover, clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and PPE.

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
